_comment_SPLIT_A: Decomposition factor for rows of Matrix A
_comment_SPLIT_B: Decomposition factor for columns of Matrix B
_comment_CASC_LN_AB: Decomposition factor for AB dimension (columns of A, rows of B)
_comment_LEGACY: SPLIT and CASC_LN are kept for backward compatibility, but SPLIT_A, SPLIT_B, and CASC_LN_AB should be used
_comment_WRD_LN: 8 for int16 and 4 for int32 elements per 128-bit PLIO
_comment_SUB_TILE: Sub-tile dimensions: A (rows of Matrix A), AB (cols of A / rows of B), B (cols of Matrix B)
_comment_GRAPH_ITER_CNT: Calculated automatically: (GEMM_SIZE_A * GEMM_SIZE_B / SPLIT_B) / (DIM_A * DIM_B). Each output file gets GEMM_SIZE_A rows × (GEMM_SIZE_B/SPLIT_B) columns
_comment_USE_DDR_ONLY_MODE: If 1, forces DDR-only mode (bypasses PS RAM). If 0, auto-detects based on memory size (>6GB). Useful for testing DDR mode with small matrices.
